subject: A suited announcer with blond hair holding a microphone in an exuberant play-by-play broadcasting stance
description: A blond-haired male figure in a suit and tie holds a microphone and gestures with the other arm in an expressive broadcasting pose. The figure is caught mid-commentary, leaning into the moment with visible enthusiasm. The background suggests a tournament setting with energy effects. The character design and styling match the announcer figure in TB2-066, forming a clear designed pair with the same character in different moments of the broadcast.
